description: Passed my PhD Qualifying Examination. Thank you Dr. Mimi Xie, Dr. Dakai Zhu, and Dr. Wei Wang!
Paper "Optimizing Task Scheduling in Fog Computing with Deadline Awareness" accepted at the 2nd IEEE SaTC 2026.
Started my Research Assistantship at the ASIC Lab, UT San Antonio.
Paper "QTE-IoT: Q-Learning-Based Task Scheduling Scheme to Enhance Energy Consumption and QoS in IoT Environments" published in Sustainable Computing: Informatics and Systems.
Paper "Controller Placement in Software-Defined Networks Using Reinforcement Learning and Metaheuristics" published in Cluster Computing.
Won the 2-minute presentation award competition at the 62nd DAC.
Awarded the DAC Young Fellows fellowship. Attended DAC 2025 as a Young Fellow and presented my research.
Started my PhD in Computer Science at UT San Antonio, advised by Dr. Mimi Xie. Joined the ASIC Lab.
